title: My profile
subtitle: Review and maintain your personal details.

messages.loginRequired: Please sign in before opening your profile.
messages.uploadNotAvailable: This server does not support employee profile image uploads yet.
messages.cameraCaptureFailed: The camera could not capture this photo. Try again or choose one from your library.
messages.libraryPermissionBlocked: Photo library access is blocked. Open system settings to allow it.
messages.permissionRequired: Camera permission is required to take a photo.
messages.cameraReady: Take a clear photo and upload it.
messages.sensitiveLoadFailed: Failed to load the sensitive details review status.
messages.sensitiveSubmitFailed: Failed to submit sensitive details for review.
messages.identitySubmitSuccess: Identity photo submitted for review. The confirmed photo changes only after approval.
messages.identityRemoveSubmitSuccess: Identity photo removal submitted for review. The confirmed photo remains until approval.
messages.versionConflict: Confirmed details have changed. Refresh and complete the form again.

status.superseded: Replaced by a newer request or administrator update

sensitive.pendingPhotoRemoval: The pending request removes the identity photo.

camera.title: Take photo
camera.permissionDescription: Allow camera access to take and upload your profile images.

imageErrors.decode_failed: This image cannot be decoded. Choose another image.
imageErrors.blob_read_failed: The processed image cannot be read. Try another image.
imageErrors.file_too_large: The image is still over 5 MiB after compression. Choose a smaller image.

cashierBarcode.title: Personal cashier barcode
cashierBarcode.empty: No cashier barcode yet. Refresh to create one.
cashierBarcode.refreshDescription: The current barcode will stop working immediately after a new one is created.
cashierBarcode.confirmationPending: The label was printed, but confirmation could not be saved. Tap retry confirmation. Do not print another label.
cashierBarcode.uncertainDescription: The app closed or lost connection during printing. Check the printer before choosing. We will not print or count it automatically.
cashierBarcode.recoveryFailed: The saved print status could not be read. Close this page and try again before printing.
cashierBarcode.revalidationFailed: The latest barcode could not be checked. Nothing was printed and the pending status was kept. Try again when connected.
cashierBarcode.printFailed: Failed to print cashier barcode label.
cashierBarcode.changed: This pending print belongs to an old barcode and cannot be confirmed. It was cleared and the latest barcode has been reloaded.

printErrors.noPrinter: No label printer is selected. Choose one in printer settings.
printErrors.bluetoothDisabled: Bluetooth is turned off. Turn it on and try again.
printErrors.permissionDenied: Bluetooth permission was denied. Allow it in system settings and try again.
printErrors.connectionFailed: The saved label printer could not be connected. Check the printer and try again.
printErrors.unknown: The label could not be printed. Check printer settings and try again.
